evidence: Added editor.containers capability and framework-neutral EditorContainer contracts in platform-api plus containerEntry/contributes.editorContainers manifest types in plugin-api.
Implemented plugin-host editorContainer validation, community rejection, capability enforcement, and trusted contribution resolution; added core slash-menu plugin manifest.

Added desktop trusted editor-container runtime metadata/resolution and renderer static loader; review blocker fix added explicit resolveEditorContainers bridge wiring through DesktopEditorBridge, main IPC, preload, and App.vue state/MarkdownEditor prop delivery.

Added editor-container adapter plus private editor-window host support for ADR0005 placements; review blocker fix made shouldActivate synchronous and anchored cursor-popover with internal coordsAtPos(mainCursor) positioning.
Added plugins/core/slash-menu dogfood package registering slashMenuEditorContainer through ctx.register.editorContainer and plugin-ui editor-container mount helpers.

Addressed independent review blockers: explicit bridge delivery, sync activation contract, cursor-popover positioning, and stale ultragoal workflow artifacts. Focused verification pending after patch.
Focused review-blocker tests passed: 5 files / 36 tests. pnpm quality:fast passed: lint, typecheck, and 66 Vitest files / 410 tests.

Removed private editor-window host exports from @zorid/editor root, moved internal consumers to @zorid/editor/internal aliases, rerendered containers on selection movement, implemented close suppression, and added captured-key routing for editor-focused containers.
Final focused tests passed: 4 files / 28 tests. pnpm quality:fast passed: lint, typecheck, and 67 Vitest files / 415 tests.

Fixed captured-key routing target mismatch by attaching slash-menu keydown handling to ctx.root. Added trusted slash-menu routing regression asserting ArrowDown changes selection and Enter accepts/closes. Focused tests passed: 3 files / 17 tests. pnpm quality:fast passed: 67 files / 416 tests.
